gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (180/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (180/ 9)
text: قَالَ لِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَا مُنِعَ مِيثَمٌ رَحِمَهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ التَّقِيَّةِ فَوَ اللَّهِ لَقَدْ عَلِمَ أَنَّ هَذِهِ الْآيَةَ نَزَلَتْ فِي عَمَّارٍ وَ أَصْحَابِهِ إِلَّا مَنْ أُكْرِهَ وَ قَلْبُهُ مُطْمَئِنٌّ بِالْإِيمانِ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel, from Muhammad Bin Marwan who said,

‘Abu Abdullahasws said to me: ‘What prevented Meysam, may Allahazwj have Mercy on him, from the dissimulation (Taqiyya)? By Allahazwj, he had known that this Verse was Revealed regarding Ammar and his companions [16:106] except the one who is compelled while his heart is at rest on account of faith’.
en.sarwar: 15. Ali has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Jamil from Muhammad ibn Marwan who has said the following: “Once abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) said to me, ‘What was it that prevented Maytham (may Allah grant him blessings) from al-Taqiyyah?’ 1 He by Allah knew that this verse of the Holy Quran was revealed about ‘Ammar and his people, ‘. . . unless he is forced, but his heart is confident with belief. . . .’”( 16 : 106 )
